data.name: request.route.idMismatch
data.value: The route identifier does not match the request body.

data.name: deliverable.publishedUrl.required
data.value: The published URL is required for published deliverables.

data.name: campaignCreator.duplicate
data.value: The creator is already linked to this campaign.

data.name: deliverableApproval.duplicateType
data.value: An approval of this type already exists for the informed deliverable.

data.name: email.configuration.invalid
data.value: Email configuration is not valid for sending documents.

data.name: proposal.responsibleUser.required
data.value: The proposal requires a valid commercial responsible. Assign a responsible to the opportunity or provide one in the proposal itself.

data.name: campaignDocument.body.required
data.value: The document needs content (generated body or URL) before being sent for signature.

data.name: webhook.secret.notConfigured
data.value: Webhook endpoint is not configured. Set Webhooks:ProviderCallbackSecret in appsettings.

data.name: creatorPortal.token.invalid
data.value: Access link is invalid, expired or revoked.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatus.initial.duplicate
data.value: An initial status is already configured.

data.name: deliverable.publish.brandApprovalRequired
data.value: Deliverable can only be published after brand approval.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.initial.duplicate
data.value: An initial stage is already configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.initial.missing
data.value: No active stage configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.final.missing
data.value: No final stage configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: imageUpload.fileType.unsupported
data.value: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: financialEntry.installments.totalRequired
data.value: To generate installments, the total must be greater than 1.

data.name: financialAccount.hasEntries.cannotDelete
data.value: Account has linked entries; deactivate instead of deleting.

data.name: financialAccount.name.duplicated
data.value: An account with this name already exists.

data.name: validation.financialAccount.color.invalidHex
data.value: Invalid color. Use the hex format (#RRGGBB).

data.name: bank.compe.duplicated
data.value: A bank with this compe code already exists.

data.name: bank.compe.systemReadonly
data.value: System banks do not allow changing the compe code.

data.name: bank.hasAccounts.cannotDelete
data.value: Bank is linked to financial accounts; deactivate instead of deleting.

data.name: validation.bank.compe.invalidFormat
data.value: Invalid compe code. Use 3 numeric digits (e.g., 001, 237, 341).

data.name: validation.bank.ispb.invalidFormat
data.value: Invalid ISPB. Use up to 8 numeric digits.

data.name: configuration.banks.subtitle
data.value: Catalog of banks used by financial accounts.

data.name: modal.bank.field.compeHint
data.value: 3-digit code used by BACEN to identify the bank (e.g., 341 = Itaú, 237 = Bradesco).

data.name: modal.bank.field.compeSystemHint
data.value: System bank. The compe code is fixed; you can still edit the display name.

data.name: modal.bank.field.logoHint
data.value: Upload a PNG, JPG or WEBP file up to 2MB. For system banks, removing the logo restores the default.

data.name: financialAccount.initialBalance.lockedAfterEntries
data.value: Cannot change the initial balance after this account has entries. Create an adjustment entry under Accounts Payable or Receivable instead.

data.name: financialAccount.sync.cannotPendWithoutConnector
data.value: Cannot mark sync as pending without an attached integration.

data.name: financialEntry.notFoundForAccount
data.value: Entry not found for this account.

data.name: opportunity.stage.inactive
data.value: Inactive pipeline stages cannot be used.

data.name: opportunity.alreadyClosed
data.value: This opportunity is already closed. Reopen it before changing state again.

data.name: opportunityNegotiation.approved.cannotReturnToPending
data.value: Approved negotiations cannot return to pending approval.

data.name: opportunityNegotiation.sendToClient.notApproved
data.value: Only approved negotiations can be sent to the client.

data.name: opportunityNegotiation.clientAcceptance.notApproved
data.value: The negotiation must be approved before client acceptance.

data.name: opportunityComment.onlyAuthorCanEdit
data.value: Only the comment author can edit it.

data.name: campaignDeliverable.amountsExceedGross
data.value: Creator amount plus agency fee cannot exceed the deliverable gross amount.

data.name: creatorPayment.alreadyFinalized
data.value: The payment is already finalized and cannot be modified.

data.name: creatorPayment.cannotCancelPaid
data.value: Cannot cancel a payment already marked as Paid.

data.name: proposal.markAsViewed.notSent
data.value: The proposal must be Sent to be marked as Viewed.

data.name: proposal.approve.notSentOrViewed
data.value: The proposal must be Sent or Viewed to be Approved.

data.name: proposal.reject.notSentOrViewed
data.value: The proposal must be Sent or Viewed to be Rejected.

data.name: proposal.convert.notApproved
data.value: The proposal must be Approved to be Converted.

data.name: proposal.item.alreadyExists
data.value: This item already exists in this proposal.

data.name: proposal.item.notFound
data.value: Item not found in this proposal.

data.name: integrationPlatform.pipeline.noDefault
data.value: The integration has no default pipeline configured.

data.name: opportunityApproval.notPending
data.value: Only pending approval requests can be decided.

data.name: opportunityComment.delete.onlyAuthor
data.value: Only the comment author can delete it.

data.name: integrationPlatform.notConfigured
data.value: Integration 'integration-platform' is not configured for this tenant.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.getFailed
data.value: Failed to get connector from IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.createFailed
data.value: Failed to create connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.updateFailed
data.value: Failed to update connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.deleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connectorAttribute.createFailed
data.value: Failed to create connector attribute value on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connectorAttribute.updateFailed
data.value: Failed to update connector attribute value on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.pipeline.executeFailed
data.value: Failed to execute pipeline on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.pipeline.enqueueFailed
data.value: Failed to enqueue pipeline on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: dashboard.revenue.empty
data.value: No revenue recorded in the last 12 months.

data.name: brands.subtitle
data.value: Register and manage the brands served by the agency

data.name: brands.preview.description
data.value: Quick summary of the selected brand

data.name: creators.subtitle
data.value: Register and track the agency's creator base

data.name: creators.preview.description
data.value: Quick summary of the selected creator

data.name: campaigns.subtitle
data.value: Manage campaigns, casting, deliverables and operations

data.name: approvals.subtitle
data.value: Center to approve or reject commercial exceptions for discount, margin, deadline and special conditions

data.name: approvals.decision.approved
data.value: Approval made by the Approvals Center.

data.name: approvals.decision.rejected
data.value: Rejection made by the Approvals Center.

data.name: pipeline.subtitle
data.value: Track leads and opportunities by stage, value in the funnel and critical follow-ups

data.name: pipeline.alert.overdue
data.value: There are overdue follow-ups in the pipeline. Prioritize these cards.

data.name: pipeline.stage.defaultDescription
data.value: Configurable stage of the commercial funnel.

data.name: pipeline.empty.description
data.value: Register leads to see the commercial funnel by stage, estimated value and follow-ups.

data.name: proposals.subtitle
data.value: Manage proposals, links to opportunities and conversion to campaigns

data.name: proposals.empty.filtered
data.value: No proposals found with current filters

data.name: proposals.search.placeholder
data.value: Search by proposal, brand or opportunity...

data.name: modal.proposalSend.placeholder.noIntegration
data.value: No integration available in this category

data.name: opportunities.subtitle
data.value: Manage the commercial funnel and track proposals, negotiations and follow-ups

data.name: opportunities.empty.filtered
data.value: No opportunities found with current filters

data.name: opportunities.search.placeholder
data.value: Search by name, brand, contact or email...

data.name: followups.subtitle
data.value: Commercial agenda — overdue, today, upcoming and completed

data.name: followups.empty.overdue.subtitle
data.value: Nice job! You're up to date.

data.name: followups.empty.today.subtitle
data.value: Use the time to get ahead on upcoming activities.

data.name: followups.empty.upcoming.subtitle
data.value: Create follow-ups inside opportunities to keep the rhythm.

data.name: followups.empty.completed.subtitle
data.value: When you mark one as completed, it shows up here.

data.name: proposalShare.confirm.revoke
data.value: Revoke this link? Anyone who already opened it will lose access.

data.name: proposalShare.generate.description
data.value: The link sends the client straight to the latest version of the proposal. No login, with view tracking.

data.name: proposalShare.draft.description
data.value: The public link displays the version sent to the client. Click Send at the top of the proposal to create the first version and unlock link generation.

data.name: proposal.share.draftNotAllowed
data.value: Send the proposal before generating a public link.

data.name: proposalShare.versions.empty
data.value: No version registered. Each time you click Send a new version is automatically generated.

data.name: configuration.integrations.actions.title
data.value: Configure who delivers each Kanvas action

data.name: configuration.integrations.actions.description
data.value: Pick the default connector and pipeline for each action. After that, modals open ready to send — you can still override per action.

data.name: configuration.integrations.actions.noConnector
data.value: No active connector in this category

data.name: modal.proposalSend.binding.missing.description
data.value: The action "Send proposal by email" has no default automation configured. You can mark the proposal as sent (without dispatching email) or configure the automation now.

data.name: integrationBinding.notConfigured
data.value: This action has no default connector/pipeline. Configure it under Settings → Integrations → Actions.

data.name: automation.userAction.notConfigured
data.value: This action has no default automation configured. Create one in Settings → Integrations → Automations with type "When the user performs".

data.name: modal.automation.triggerType.event.description
data.value: Reacts to system events (e.g. proposal approved).

data.name: modal.automation.triggerType.userAction.description
data.value: Default for manual buttons (e.g. click Send Proposal).

data.name: opportunityActivity.placeholder
data.value: Write an internal comment about this opportunity...

data.name: proposalDetail.items.empty
data.value: No items registered for this proposal

data.name: proposalDetail.convert.description
data.value: Link this approved proposal to an existing campaign. Items already registered will be referenced by the campaign.

data.name: opportunityDetail.proposals.description
data.value: Each proposal has items (creators, platforms, values), PDF, public link, status and conversion into campaign. Click a row to open the full detail.

data.name: opportunityDetail.proposals.empty
data.value: No proposals linked. Use the New proposal button above to create the first one.

data.name: opportunityDetail.negotiations.description
data.value: Each negotiation records a round of offer with value and reason (initial proposal, counter offer, discount adjustment). Select one to edit or request internal approval.

data.name: opportunityDetail.negotiations.changeStatus.description
data.value: Select the new status of the negotiation. Changes are not propagated to the Approvals tab.

data.name: opportunityDetail.negotiations.title.request
data.value: Request internal approval for this negotiation

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.description
data.value: Approvals are created from negotiations. Go to Negotiations tab, select one and click "Request approval".

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.empty
data.value: No approval recorded. Create one from a negotiation in the Negotiations tab.

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.decision.approved
data.value: Approval made in the commercial flow.

data.name: opportunityDetail.followups.description
data.value: Commitments and tasks for this opportunity (calls, proposal sending, returns). Mark as completed after each contact to keep history.

data.name: creators.detail.noCampaigns
data.value: Creator has not participated in any campaigns yet

data.name: campaign.detail.noCreators
data.value: No creator linked to this campaign

data.name: configuration.agency.logoError.format
data.value: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: configuration.creatorStatuses.subtitle
data.value: Creator stages within the campaign (invited, accepted, in production, published).

data.name: configuration.contractTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Contracts and terms with variables filled automatically when generating the campaign document.

data.name: configuration.commercialFunnel.subtitle
data.value: Pipeline stages (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost).

data.name: configuration.deliverableKinds.subtitle
data.value: Register and organize the deliverable types available for campaigns.

data.name: configuration.emailTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Templates triggered automatically on proposal and opportunity events.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.subtitle
data.value: Cash, bank accounts and cards used in financial entries.

data.name: configuration.financialSubcategories.subtitle
data.value: Custom subcategories to detail financial entries.

data.name: configuration.integrations.subtitle
data.value: Connect external accounts and configure automatic actions for Kanvas events.

data.name: configuration.opportunitySources.subtitle
data.value: Where your leads come from. Use for channel analysis and reports.

data.name: configuration.opportunityTags.subtitle
data.value: Custom labels (strategic, hot, Q4, etc.) to classify deals.

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Reusable templates with standard items to speed up proposal creation.

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplate.subtitle
data.value: Customize the proposal PDF layout with HTML and CSS.

data.name: configuration.dashboard.automationsByModule.subtitle
data.value: Distribution of active ones by the triggering event

data.name: financial.aging.subtitle
data.value: Distribution of pending entries by overdue range

data.name: financial.cashFlow.subtitle
data.value: Projected and actual inflows and outflows for the period

data.name: financial.creatorPayments.subtitle
data.value: Manage individual and batch payments, attach invoices and trigger via gateway.

data.name: financial.entries.placeholder.search
data.value: Search by description, counterpart or reference

data.name: financial.payables.subtitle
data.value: Creator payments, suppliers, taxes and operating expenses.

data.name: financial.receivables.subtitle
data.value: Agency inflow entries: brand, bonuses and adjustments.

data.name: operations.approvals.subtitle
data.value: Deliverables awaiting brand approval before publishing

data.name: public.deliverable.invalidLink.message
data.value: Request a new approval link from the agency.

data.name: modal.automation.placeholder.noAccounts
data.value: No connected accounts in this category

data.name: modal.automation.hint.connectFirst
data.value: Connect an account first in Settings → Integrations.

data.name: modal.applyProposalTemplate.description
data.value: Template items will be added to the proposal. Existing items are not removed.

data.name: modal.document.noTemplate
data.value: This document was not generated from a template. Use the URL above to access the original content.

data.name: modal.document.placeholder.noTemplates
data.value: No active templates for this type

data.name: modal.creator.photo.error.invalidFormat
data.value: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: modal.emailTemplate.placeholder.noVariables
data.value: No variables available for this event.

data.name: modal.opportunityApproval.help.approvers
data.value: Each approver will receive a notification. Any of them can approve or reject.

data.name: modal.opportunity.placeholder.noTags
data.value: No tags registered. Create in Settings → Opportunity tags.

data.name: modal.proposalBlock.description
data.value: Clauses, commercial terms, standard descriptions. Use blocks to insert ready snippets in the proposal editor.

data.name: modal.proposalTemplate.description
data.value: Define a reusable model with standard proposal items. When applied to a deal, items are copied to the proposal.

data.name: common.state.adjustFilters
data.value: Adjust the filters or add a new record.

data.name: financial.entries.emptyReceivable
data.value: No receivable entries in the period.

data.name: financial.entries.emptyPayable
data.value: No payable entries in the period.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete account "{0}"? If there are entries, prefer to deactivate.

data.name: modal.financialAccount.field.initialBalanceLockedHint
data.value: Balance locked — this account already has entries. Create an adjustment entry under Accounts Payable or Receivable.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.connector.modal.description
data.value: Choose which integration should feed this account with balance and statement.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.connector.modal.empty
data.value: No active integrations. Create one in the Integrations screen.

data.name: configuration.commercialFunnel.empty
data.value: No stages configured for the commercial pipeline

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplates.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete template "{0}"? Items already copied to proposals will remain there.

data.name: automations.empty.description
data.value: Create automations to run pipelines when events occur in Kanvas.

data.name: creators.detail.empty.deliverables
data.value: No deliverables registered for this creator

data.name: agencySettings.saveProposalTemplate.description
data.value: Allows saving the proposal HTML template.

data.name: agencySettings.previewProposalTemplate.description
data.value: Allows previewing the proposal HTML template.

data.name: agencySettings.getProposalTemplateVersions.description
data.value: Allows listing saved proposal template versions.

data.name: agencySettings.saveProposalTemplateVersion.description
data.value: Allows saving a new proposal template version.

data.name: agencySettings.getProposalTemplateVersionById.description
data.value: Allows consulting a proposal template version by ID.

data.name: agencySettings.updateProposalTemplateVersion.description
data.value: Allows updating a proposal template (layout) version.

data.name: agencySettings.activateProposalTemplateVersion.description
data.value: Allows activating a proposal template version.

data.name: agencySettings.deleteProposalTemplateVersion.description
data.value: Allows deleting a proposal template version.

data.name: automations.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma automacao.

data.name: automations.logs.description
data.value: Permite consultar os logs de execucao de uma automacao.

data.name: automations.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma automacao.

data.name: bankTransactions.getByAccount.description
data.value: Permite listar transações bancárias de uma conta.

data.name: bankTransactions.import.description
data.value: Permite que o IntegrationPlatform importe transações bancárias para uma conta.

data.name: bankTransactions.match.description
data.value: Permite casar manualmente uma transação bancária com um lançamento financeiro.

data.name: bankTransactions.unmatch.description
data.value: Permite desfazer o vínculo entre uma transação bancária e um lançamento financeiro.

data.name: banks.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um novo banco no catálogo.

data.name: banks.delete.description
data.value: Permite excluir um banco custom (não permitido em bancos do sistema).

data.name: banks.getActive.description
data.value: Permite listar bancos ativos para seleção.

data.name: banks.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar um banco por id.

data.name: banks.removeLogo.description
data.value: Permite remover o logo customizado do banco (bancos system voltam ao logo padrão).

data.name: banks.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de um banco.

data.name: banks.uploadLogo.description
data.value: Permite enviar o logo do banco.

data.name: brands.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma marca.

data.name: brands.removeLogo.description
data.value: Permite remover a logo da marca.

data.name: brands.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma marca.

data.name: brands.uploadLogo.description
data.value: Permite enviar a logo da marca.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatuses.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um status de creator em campanha.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatuses.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os status configurados de creators em campanhas.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatuses.getActive.description
data.value: Permite listar os status ativos de creators em campanhas.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatuses.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar um status de creator em campanha.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatuses.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um status de creator em campanha.

data.name: campaignCreators.create.description
data.value: Permite vincular um creator a uma campanha.

data.name: campaignCreators.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os creators vinculados às campanhas.

data.name: campaignCreators.getByCampaign.description
data.value: Permite listar os creators vinculados a uma campanha.

data.name: campaignCreators.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um vínculo entre campanha e creator.

data.name: campaignCreators.getStatusHistory.description
data.value: Permite consultar o histórico de mudanças de status de um creator na campanha.

data.name: campaignCreators.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar o vínculo entre campanha e creator.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma nova entrega de campanha.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.delete.description
data.value: Permite excluir uma entrega de campanha.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as entregas de campanha cadastradas.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.getByCampaign.description
data.value: Permite listar as entregas vinculadas a uma campanha.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma entrega de campanha.

data.name: campaignDeliverables.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma entrega de campanha.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um template de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.delete.description
data.value: Permite remover um template de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os templates de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.getActiveByDocumentType.description
data.value: Permite listar os templates ativos por tipo de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar um template de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.preview.description
data.value: Permite pre-visualizar o body do template com dados de exemplo.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um template de documento.

data.name: campaignDocumentTemplates.variables.description
data.value: Permite listar as variaveis disponiveis por tipo de documento.

data.name: campaignDocuments.generateFromTemplate.description
data.value: Permite gerar um documento a partir de um template.

data.name: campaignDocuments.getByCampaign.description
data.value: Permite listar os documentos vinculados a uma campanha.

data.name: campaignDocuments.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um documento.

data.name: campaignDocuments.markSigned.description
data.value: Permite marcar um documento como assinado.

data.name: campaignDocuments.sendEmail.description
data.value: Permite enviar um documento por e-mail.

data.name: campaignDocuments.sendForSignature.description
data.value: Permite enviar um documento para assinatura digital via IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: campaigns.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma campanha.

data.name: campaigns.getStatusHistory.description
data.value: Permite consultar o histórico de mudanças de status de uma campanha.

data.name: campaigns.getSummary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo de uma campanha.

data.name: campaigns.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma campanha.

data.name: commercialPipelineStages.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um estágio do pipeline comercial.

data.name: commercialPipelineStages.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os estágios configurados do pipeline comercial.

data.name: commercialPipelineStages.getActive.description
data.value: Permite listar os estágios ativos do pipeline comercial.

data.name: commercialPipelineStages.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar um estágio do pipeline comercial.

data.name: commercialPipelineStages.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um estágio do pipeline comercial.

data.name: creatorAccessTokens.getByCreator.description
data.value: Permite listar os links de acesso ao portal de um creator.

data.name: creatorAccessTokens.issue.description
data.value: Permite emitir um novo link de acesso ao portal do creator.

data.name: creatorAccessTokens.revoke.description
data.value: Permite revogar um link de acesso ao portal do creator.

data.name: creatorPayments.attachInvoice.description
data.value: Permite anexar nota fiscal a um pagamento.

data.name: creatorPayments.create.description
data.value: Permite registrar um pagamento a creator.

data.name: creatorPayments.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os pagamentos de creators.

data.name: creatorPayments.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um pagamento.

data.name: creatorPayments.markPaid.description
data.value: Permite marcar um pagamento como pago.

data.name: creatorPayments.scheduleBatch.description
data.value: Permite agendar um lote de pagamentos via gateway.

data.name: creatorPayments.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar dados de um pagamento.

data.name: creatorSocialHandles.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um handle social para o creator.

data.name: creatorSocialHandles.delete.description
data.value: Permite excluir um handle social do creator.

data.name: creatorSocialHandles.getByCreator.description
data.value: Permite listar os handles sociais de um creator.

data.name: creatorSocialHandles.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um handle social do creator.

data.name: creators.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um creator.

data.name: creators.getCampaigns.description
data.value: Permite listar as campanhas em que o creator participou.

data.name: creators.getSummary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo de performance de um creator.

data.name: creators.removePhoto.description
data.value: Permite remover a foto do creator.

data.name: creators.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de um creator.

data.name: creators.uploadPhoto.description
data.value: Permite enviar a foto do creator.

data.name: dashboard.overview.description
data.value: Permite consultar a visão geral do dashboard da agência.

data.name: deliverableApprovals.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma aprovação para uma entrega.

data.name: deliverableApprovals.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as aprovações de entregas.

data.name: deliverableApprovals.getByDeliverable.description
data.value: Permite listar as aprovações de uma entrega específica.

data.name: deliverableApprovals.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma aprovação de entrega.

data.name: deliverableApprovals.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar uma aprovação de entrega.

data.name: deliverableKinds.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um novo tipo de entrega.

data.name: deliverableKinds.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os tipos de entrega cadastrados.

data.name: deliverableKinds.getActive.description
data.value: Permite listar os tipos de entrega ativos.

data.name: deliverableKinds.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um tipo de entrega.

data.name: deliverableKinds.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de um tipo de entrega.

data.name: deliverableShareLinks.create.description
data.value: Permite gerar um share link para aprovação da marca.

data.name: deliverableShareLinks.getByDeliverable.description
data.value: Permite listar os share links de uma entrega.

data.name: deliverableShareLinks.getPending.description
data.value: Permite listar as entregas com aprovação pendente da marca.

data.name: deliverableShareLinks.revoke.description
data.value: Permite revogar um share link de entrega.

data.name: financialAccounts.attachConnector.description
data.value: Permite vincular uma conta financeira a um conector do IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: financialAccounts.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma nova conta financeira.

data.name: financialAccounts.detachConnector.description
data.value: Permite remover o vínculo da conta financeira com o conector.

data.name: financialAccounts.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as contas financeiras cadastradas.

data.name: financialAccounts.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar uma conta financeira por id.

data.name: financialAccounts.getSummary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo agregado das contas financeiras.

data.name: financialAccounts.sync.description
data.value: Permite disparar uma sincronização manual da conta financeira.

data.name: financialEntries.createInstallments.description
data.value: Permite gerar uma série de parcelas a partir de um lançamento financeiro.

data.name: financialEntries.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os lançamentos financeiros cadastrados.

data.name: financialEntries.getByCampaign.description
data.value: Permite listar os lançamentos financeiros vinculados a uma campanha.

data.name: financialEntries.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de um lançamento financeiro.

data.name: financialEntries.getSummary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo financeiro por tipo (a receber/a pagar).

data.name: financialEntries.markAsPaid.description
data.value: Permite marcar um lançamento financeiro como pago/recebido.

data.name: financialReports.getAging.description
data.value: Permite consultar o relatório de aging financeiro.

data.name: financialReports.getCashFlow.description
data.value: Permite consultar o fluxo de caixa por período e granularidade.

data.name: financialSubcategories.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as subcategorias financeiras cadastradas.

data.name: integrationCategories.getActive.description
data.value: Permite listar as categorias de integracao disponiveis.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.createConnector.description
data.value: Permite criar um conector no IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.deleteConnector.description
data.value: Permite excluir um conector do IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.enqueuePipeline.description
data.value: Permite enfileirar um pipeline no IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.executePipeline.description
data.value: Permite executar um pipeline no IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getActiveConnectors.description
data.value: Permite listar todos os conectores ativos do tenant.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getConnectorDetail.description
data.value: Permite obter os detalhes de um conector do IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getConnectorsByCategoryIdentifier.description
data.value: Permite listar conectores ativos filtrados pelo identifier da categoria de integração.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getConnectorsByIntegration.description
data.value: Permite listar conectores de uma integração.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getIntegrationAttributes.description
data.value: Permite listar atributos configuráveis de uma integração.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getIntegrationsByCategory.description
data.value: Permite listar integrações disponíveis no IntegrationPlatform por categoria.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.getPipelinesByIntegration.description
data.value: Permite listar pipelines de uma integração.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.setConnectorActive.description
data.value: Permite ativar ou desativar um conector sem reenviar todas as configuracoes.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.testConnector.description
data.value: Permite testar um conector executando o pipeline de teste correspondente.

data.name: integrationPlatformProxy.updateConnector.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um conector no IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: opportunities.board.description
data.value: Permite consultar o board comercial por estágio.

data.name: opportunities.boardOwn.description
data.value: Allows reading the commercial board limited to opportunities owned by the user.

data.name: opportunities.analyticsOwn.description
data.value: Allows reading commercial funnel analytics for the user's own opportunities.

data.name: opportunities.forecast.description
data.value: Allows reading the commercial sales forecast.

data.name: opportunities.forecastOwn.description
data.value: Allows reading the sales forecast for the user's own opportunities.

data.name: opportunities.getOwn.description
data.value: Allows listing only the opportunities owned by the user.

data.name: opportunities.changeStage.description
data.value: Permite alterar o estágio de uma oportunidade comercial.

data.name: opportunities.changeStatus.description
data.value: Permite alterar o status de uma negociação.

data.name: opportunities.closeAsLost.description
data.value: Permite encerrar uma oportunidade como perdida.

data.name: opportunities.closeAsWon.description
data.value: Permite encerrar uma oportunidade como ganha.

data.name: opportunities.complete.description
data.value: Permite concluir um follow-up da oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma nova oportunidade comercial.

data.name: opportunities.createComment.description
data.value: Permite adicionar um comentário a uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.createFollowUp.description
data.value: Permite adicionar um follow-up a uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.createNegotiation.description
data.value: Permite adicionar uma negociação a uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.dashboard.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo do dashboard comercial.

data.name: opportunities.deleteFollowUp.description
data.value: Permite excluir um follow-up da oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.deleteNegotiation.description
data.value: Permite excluir uma negociação da oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as oportunidades comerciais cadastradas.

data.name: opportunities.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma oportunidade comercial.

data.name: opportunities.getComments.description
data.value: Permite listar os comentários de uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.getFollowUps.description
data.value: Permite listar os follow-ups de uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.getFollowUpsSummary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo de follow-ups.

data.name: opportunities.getNegotiations.description
data.value: Permite listar as negociações de uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.stageHistory.description
data.value: Permite consultar o histórico de estágios de uma oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma oportunidade comercial.

data.name: opportunities.updateFollowUp.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um follow-up da oportunidade.

data.name: opportunities.updateNegotiation.description
data.value: Permite atualizar uma negociação da oportunidade.

data.name: opportunityApprovals.get.description
data.value: Permite listar todas as aprovações comerciais.

data.name: opportunityApprovals.getByNegotiation.description
data.value: Permite listar as aprovações de uma negociação comercial.

data.name: opportunityApprovals.summary.description
data.value: Permite consultar o resumo de aprovações comerciais.

data.name: opportunityWinReasons.create.description
data.value: Allows creating an opportunity win reason.

data.name: opportunityWinReasons.delete.description
data.value: Allows deleting an opportunity win reason.

data.name: opportunityWinReasons.get.description
data.value: Allows listing registered opportunity win reasons.

data.name: opportunityWinReasons.update.description
data.value: Allows updating an opportunity win reason.

data.name: opportunityLossReasons.create.description
data.value: Allows creating an opportunity loss reason.

data.name: opportunityLossReasons.delete.description
data.value: Allows deleting an opportunity loss reason.

data.name: opportunityLossReasons.get.description
data.value: Allows listing registered opportunity loss reasons.

data.name: opportunityLossReasons.update.description
data.value: Allows updating an opportunity loss reason.

data.name: opportunitySources.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma tag de oportunidade.

data.name: opportunitySources.delete.description
data.value: Permite excluir uma tag de oportunidade.

data.name: opportunitySources.get.description
data.value: Permite listar as tags de oportunidades cadastradas.

data.name: opportunitySources.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar uma tag de oportunidade.

data.name: platforms.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma plataforma.

data.name: platforms.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma plataforma.

data.name: profile.uploadAvatar.description
data.value: Permite enviar foto de perfil do usuário.

data.name: proposalTemplates.applyToProposal.description
data.value: Permite aplicar um template a uma proposta existente.

data.name: proposalTemplates.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar um template de proposta.

data.name: proposalTemplates.delete.description
data.value: Permite excluir um template de proposta.

data.name: proposalTemplates.get.description
data.value: Permite listar os templates de proposta.

data.name: proposalTemplates.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar um template de proposta.

data.name: proposalTemplates.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um template de proposta.

data.name: proposals.convertToCampaign.description
data.value: Permite converter uma proposta em campanha.

data.name: proposals.create.description
data.value: Permite cadastrar uma nova proposta comercial.

data.name: proposals.createItem.description
data.value: Permite adicionar um item a uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.createShareLink.description
data.value: Permite gerar um novo link público para uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.deleteItem.description
data.value: Permite excluir um item da proposta.

data.name: proposals.getById.description
data.value: Permite consultar os detalhes de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.getItems.description
data.value: Permite listar os itens de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.getPdf.description
data.value: Permite baixar a proposta em PDF.

data.name: proposals.getShareLinks.description
data.value: Permite listar os links de compartilhamento de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.getVersionById.description
data.value: Permite consultar uma versão específica de proposta.

data.name: proposals.getVersions.description
data.value: Permite listar as versões de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.markAsViewed.description
data.value: Permite marcar uma proposta como visualizada.

data.name: proposals.revokeShareLink.description
data.value: Permite revogar um link público de proposta.

data.name: proposals.send.description
data.value: Permite enviar uma proposta para a marca.

data.name: proposals.statusHistory.description
data.value: Permite consultar o histórico de status de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.update.description
data.value: Permite atualizar os dados de uma proposta.

data.name: proposals.updateItem.description
data.value: Permite atualizar um item da proposta.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.get.description
data.value: List active bindings between business actions and configured connectors.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.getByIntent.description
data.value: Get the binding of a specific intent with the configured connector.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.getCatalog.description
data.value: Get the catalog of integrable business actions in Kanvas.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.getSummary.description
data.value: Get the catalog enriched with bindings and available accounts per intent.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.set.description
data.value: Define the active connector for a business action.

data.name: integrationCapabilities.remove.description
data.value: Remove the binding between a business action and a connector.

data.name: integrationCapability.notConfigured
data.value: No active connector has been configured for this action. Set up the integration at Settings → Integrations.

data.name: integrationCallback.received.unhandled
data.value: Callback received but no handler is registered for this service.

data.name: campaignDocuments.sendWhatsapp.description
data.value: Send a campaign document via WhatsApp.

data.name: opportunityNegotiation.statusTransition.pendingApprovalRequiresRequest
data.value: To set the negotiation as pending approval use "Request approval", which creates the internal request.
